email.title: Email
email.description: Raw email that was verified. Use as the email input for gated actions.

message.title: Message
message.description: Message to relay to the shopper.

verified.title: Verified
verified.description: True if the code matched and the shopper is now verified for the session.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email Proof
verifiedEmail.description: Opaque proof returned only after a correct code. Pass this as verifiedEmail for gated actions; never display it.
